---
name: New language adapter
about: Propose or track a new language adapter
title: '[Adapter] <language>'
labels: adapter
assignees: ''
---

**Language**
Which language? (e.g. Rust, Go, Ruby)

**Tree-sitter grammar**
Link to the tree-sitter grammar package. Is it mature/stable?

**Use case**
What codebases or agent workflows would this adapter serve?

**Are you willing to implement it?**
- [ ] Yes, I plan to implement this
- [ ] No, I am requesting it

See CONTRIBUTING.md — "Adding a new language adapter" for
implementation requirements.
